results.rationale_brief: Comparative pros/cons of anticoagulation options well-articulated; minor typo '노AC' but content medically sound.
Dollar smile correctly described but Dollar Frown is non-standard term; comparison is somewhat superficial.
Clear competitive rationale with concrete pricing data; less comparative depth than expected for 'hard'.
Comprehensive list of modifiable/non-modifiable bleeding risks with appropriate management strategies.
Generic AI capabilities described; differentiation from prior digital transformation is asserted but not deeply analyzed.
Excellent biomechanical reasoning on lever effect for crown length; appropriately hard comparative.
Comparison adequate but somewhat brief; bilateral occlusion rationale could be more detailed.
Company-specific descriptive content; not 'hard' explanatory by clinical reasoning standard.
Excellent contrast of PRF (soft tissue/growth factors) vs BMP (osteoinduction) with clinical application synthesis.
'힐드 리치' likely transcription artifact for 'healed ridge'; non-submerging rationale conveyed but term confusing.
Duplicate of q007; identical high-quality PRF vs BMP comparison.
Duplicate of q050; same quality anticoagulation options comparison.
Clear three-point before/after improvement; comparative label fits but content is straightforward operational.
Clear problem-solution comparison structure with concrete consumer pain points addressed by AI agent.
Distinct mechanisms of HTN (vascular damage) vs hyperglycemia (workload) for DN clearly compared.
Excellent blended finance structure with concrete figures (160万 tons, 8% return, subordinated/senior LP split).
Nuanced AI-era fiduciary duty contrast (over- vs under-reliance) with legal framework reference.
Multiple regulatory shifts (ex-ante to ex-post, autonomous, sandbox) addressed coherently.
Excellent threshold-based selection criteria (10mm, 15mm) with mechanism (PRF absorption 10-14d) and material name (DBBM).
Excellent biomechanical contrast (PDL cushioning vs osseointegrated rigid) with clinical implications for free-end prosthesis.
Cites long-term study with specific numbers (288 implants, 7 failures, 13y); All-on-4 vs All-on-6 comparison shows no difference.
Park Chung-hee 5-year plan rationale and contrast with prior plans well-articulated.
Brief English answer stating equivalence with three metrics; lacks depth for 'hard' comparative label.
Concrete layoff figure (24만) and timeline contrast Silicon Valley vs Korea AI adoption; some claims hard to verify.
Three components of Intuitive ecosystem with evolution narrative; company-specific descriptive content.
